word: H3655 - כָּנָה - kânâh - kaw-naw' - Give flattering titles

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּנה

Transliteration: kânâh

Phonetic: kaw-naw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to title, surname, be surnamed, give an epithet or cognomen, give a flattering title
    1. (Piel) to call by name, give a title, betitle

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 997

Part(s) of speech: Verb
